name: Cranswick PLC
description: A leading UK food producer with revenue of over £2.7 billion, producing and supplying premium pork, poultry, convenience foods and pet food to UK grocery retailers, food service and export markets. Vertically integrated farm-to-fork model with growing pig and poultry farming operations.

assumptions.revenueDrivers: UK grocery retail demand for premium pork, poultry, convenience and Mediterranean foods. Revenue £2,723m in FY2025 (+6.8% on 52-week basis). Poultry revenue grew 20%+ and now 19.6% of group. Pet food revenue +48%. 10-year sole supply deal with Sainsbury's. China export licence reinstated.
assumptions.marginDrivers: Adjusted operating margin improved to 7.6% in FY2025 (from 7.1%), driven by growing pig farming contribution, excellent capacity utilisation, and tight cost control. Vertical integration deepening with pig self-sufficiency approaching 55%. Record £138m capex investment.
assumptions.risks: UK consumer spending pressure, pig/poultry disease risk (ASF, avian influenza, FMD), commodity input cost volatility, customer concentration (top 4 = 60% of revenue), rising net debt (£172m vs £99m prior year) from record capex and acquisitions, planning system delays on expansion projects.
assumptions.catalyst: Poultry capacity expansion (£50m+ investment), Hull primary processing upgrade to 50,000 pigs/week, JSR Genetics integration driving production efficiency, Worsley houmous facility ramp-up, Blakemans food service acquisition, continued dividend growth (35 consecutive years).
assumptions.lastReportAnalysed: FY2025 Annual Report (52 weeks ended 29 March 2025)
